description: Kenya pavement material specifications from RDM 3.3 Table 8.8 and Materials Specification Charts. Covers granular materials (G-series), graded crushed stone (GCS-series), hand packed stone (HPS), hydraulically improved granular (HIG-series), hydraulically modified stone (HMS), hydraulically bound stone (HBS-series), and bitumen stabilised materials (BSM-series).

G8.material: Natural materials blended with up to 20% stone aggregates
G8.layer: Lower capping on S1 to convert to S2

G10.material: Natural or blended silty/sandy/gravelly clays, sands, or gravels
G10.layer: Capping on S1 and S2 subgrade for foundation class F1

G14.material: Natural or blended silty/clayey materials, volcanic gravel (scoria)
G14.layer: Capping on S1-S3 for foundation classes F1 and F2

G20.material: Natural gravel or mixtures of natural materials with up to 30% stone

G23.material: Natural or blended silty and clayey materials
G23.layer: Capping on S2 and S3 subgrades for foundation classes F2 and F3

G25.layer: Sub-base for traffic classes TC0.5 and TC0.25

G30.layer: Base for TC0.1 and TC0.025; Sub-base for TC1, TC3, TC10

G45.material: Natural/blended materials OR crushed stone gravel
G45.layer: Capping S3-S5/F2-F4; Base TC0.5; Sub-base TC0.25/TC1-TC10

G80.material: Natural/blended materials with up to 30% stone OR crushed stone gravel
G80.layer: Base for TC1, TC3, TC10; Sub-base for TC17

requirements.notes: In dry areas (rainfall < 500mm), CBR 60% may be used for TC1 base with Chief Engineer (Materials) approval

GCS-F.material: Crushed stone Class F, mostly weathered rock

GCS-E.material: Crushed stone Class E, mostly soft stone and partially weathered rock

GCS-D.material: Crushed stone Class D, partially weathered granites, basalts, and other rocks
GCS-D.layer: Base TC1, TC3, TC10; Sub-base TC17

GCS-C.material: GCS Class C, fresh corals and metamorphic rocks

GCS-B.material: GCS Class B, mostly fresh granites, basalts, and other igneous rocks

GCS-A.material: GCS Class A, fresh granites, basalts, and other igneous rocks
GCS-A.layer: Base TC17; Sub-base TC30/TC50; Capping S5-S6/F5 for TC80+

HPS.material: Hand Packed Stone, mostly fresh trachytes, soft stone, basalts, igneous rocks

HIG50.material: Lime and hydraulically improved granular material

HIG60.material: Lime and hydraulically improved granular material
HIG60.layer: Sub-base TC1, TC3, TC10; Base TC0.025, TC0.1

HIG100.material: Lime and hydraulically improved granular material

HIG160.material: Lime and hydraulically improved granular material
HIG160.layer: Base TC1, TC3, TC10; Sub-base TC17, TC30, TC50; Capping S5-S6/F5 for TC80+

HMS1.layer: Base TC1, TC3, TC10; Sub-base TC17, TC30, TC50; Capping S5-S6/F5 for TC80+

HBS3.layer: Base TC17, TC30, TC50; Sub-base TC80+

HBS6.layer: Base TC17, TC30, TC50; Sub-base for concrete pavement TC150+

HBS9.layer: Base TC50+; Sub-base for concrete pavement TC150+

bituminous_materials.source: RDM 3.3 Chapter 8, Charts SU1-SU11, BB1-BB2; Standard Specification for Road and Bridge Construction (2025)
bituminous_materials.description: Bituminous surfacing and base materials for Kenya pavement structures. Specifications from Materials Specification Charts and Standard Specification.

asphalt_concrete.description: Hot mix asphalt concrete for wearing course and binder course. Kenya references KS EN 13108 series. Marshall method is primary design approach in East Africa.

AC20.use: Binder course; wearing course on heavily trafficked roads (TC30+)
AC20.marshall_stability_min_kn: Chart SU1 -- verify against RDM 3.3 PDF
AC20.verification: Values from RDM 3.3 Charts SU1-SU4 -- verify against PDF

AC14.marshall_stability_min_kn: Chart SU2 -- verify against RDM 3.3 PDF
AC14.verification: Values from RDM 3.3 Charts SU1-SU4 -- verify against PDF

AC10.use: Wearing course for moderate traffic (TC1-TC3); patching
AC10.marshall_stability_min_kn: Chart SU3 -- verify against RDM 3.3 PDF
AC10.verification: Values from RDM 3.3 Charts SU1-SU4 -- verify against PDF

common_properties.design_method: Marshall (75 blows per face for TC10+; 50 blows for lower traffic classes)
common_properties.vma_min_pct: Varies by nominal aggregate size -- Chart SU1-SU4
common_properties.verification: Common property ranges from Standard Specification -- verify exact values against Charts SU1-SU4

bitumen_grade.normal_inland: 60/70 penetration grade (standard for most Kenya climate zones)
bitumen_grade.coastal_hot: 80/100 penetration grade (coastal areas, mean annual temperature > 27C)
bitumen_grade.heavy_traffic: PMB (polymer modified binder) required for TC30+ per Standard Specification
bitumen_grade.source: Standard Specification for Road and Bridge Construction, Bituminous Works section
bitumen_grade.verification: Binder grade zones from Standard Specification -- verify climate zone boundaries against PDF

aggregate_requirements.source: Standard Specification, Section on Coarse Aggregates for Bituminous Mixes
aggregate_requirements.verification: Aggregate values from Standard Specification -- verify against PDF

surface_dressing.description: Surface dressing types for sealing and surfacing. Kenya specifies multiple surface treatment types for different traffic classes and conditions.

types.name: Single surface dressing (SSD)
types.application: Resealing existing surfaced roads; new surfacing for TC0.025-TC1
types.description: Single application of binder followed by single layer of chippings

types.name: Double surface dressing (DSD)
types.application: New surfacing for TC0.5-TC10; resealing for TC3-TC10
types.description: Two applications of binder and chippings, providing better texture and durability

types.name: Cape seal
types.application: New surfacing for TC3-TC17; provides dense, waterproof surface
types.description: Single surface dressing followed by slurry seal -- combines chip seal durability with slurry waterproofing

types.name: Otta seal (single)
types.application: Low-volume roads TC0.025-TC1; uses softer binder and graded aggregate
types.description: Uses continuously graded aggregate rolled into soft binder; suitable for lower-quality aggregates

types.name: Otta seal (double)
types.description: Two layers of Otta seal for improved durability

types.name: Sand seal
types.application: Enrichment seal on existing surfacing; fog seal alternative
types.description: Binder application followed by fine sand cover; enriches dry/oxidised surfaces

types.name: Slurry seal / micro-surfacing
types.application: Maintenance resurfacing; texture restoration on existing AC; Cape seal component
types.description: Emulsion-aggregate-water slurry applied as thin overlay; micro-surfacing uses PMB emulsion for heavier traffic

aggregate_requirements.source: Standard Specification, Aggregate for Surface Dressing
aggregate_requirements.verification: Aggregate thresholds from Standard Specification -- verify ACV/LAA traffic boundaries against PDF

binder_options.emulsion: K1-60, K1-70, or K3-60 cationic emulsion per Standard Specification
binder_options.cutback: MC-30, MC-70 for priming; MC-3000 for tack coat
binder_options.otta_seal_binder: 150/200 penetration or MC-3000 (soft binder for aggregate embedment)
binder_options.source: Standard Specification, Binders for Surface Dressing
binder_options.verification: Binder types from Standard Specification -- verify emulsion grades against PDF

bituminous_base.description: Asphalt base (dense bitumen macadam / DBM) for high-traffic pavement structures. Specified in Charts BB1-BB2.

BB1.material: Dense Bitumen Macadam (DBM) -- continuously graded asphalt base

requirements.stability: Chart BB1 -- verify against RDM 3.3 PDF
requirements.verification: Values from RDM 3.3 Chart BB1 -- verify against PDF

BB2.material: Dense Bitumen Macadam (DBM) -- high modulus base
BB2.application: Base course for TC50+; high-modulus base for heavily trafficked trunk roads

requirements.stability: Chart BB2 -- verify against RDM 3.3 PDF
requirements.verification: Values from RDM 3.3 Chart BB2 -- verify against PDF

bitumen_grade.high_modulus: 10/20 or 15/25 penetration grade for BB2 high-modulus base
bitumen_grade.verification: Binder grades from Charts BB1-BB2 -- verify against PDF

aggregate_requirements.source: Standard Specification, Aggregate for Bituminous Base
aggregate_requirements.verification: Values from Standard Specification -- verify against PDF
